data.prompt: Generate a book description written by  Miguel de Cervantes.
data.output:
Of course — here is a book description written in a style inspired by Miguel de Cervantes:

In this volume the reader shall encounter not merely a tale, but a mirror wherein life itself, with all its follies, honors, misfortunes, and vanities, is faithfully reflected. Here wander men of noble intention and uncertain judgment, ladies of wit and dignity, and those strange accidents by which Fortune, that capricious mistress, delights to raise the low and humble the proud. Between laughter and sorrow, adventure and reflection, this work unfolds as do the roads of Spain: now broad and sunlit, now rough with dust and danger, yet ever worth the traveling. If within these pages there be jest, let it not obscure the truth; if there be sorrow, let it not banish delight. For such is the manner of the world, and such, too, is the manner of this book.
